---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for CodeOrbit AI.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm frustrated when..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include how this fits into the existing multi-agent flow (e.g. Planning, Execution, Review, or Consensus stages).

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, designs, or mockups about the feature request here.
